channel.title: Reference on netlog
channel.description: Recent content in Reference on netlog

item.title: Subnetting: From First Principles to VLSM
item.description: A practical subnetting guide covering binary math, CIDR notation, VLSM, and common exam-style calculations — written for engineers who want to understand the why.

item.title: OSPF LSA Types: A Field Reference
item.description: A concise reference for OSPF LSA types 1–7, what they carry, and which routers originate them.
